tasks.subject: [opencode-connect-overhaul] [P1] Shared types: ModelTier + ModelOption metadata + Ollama installed/pull schemas
tasks.description: In @dorkos/shared: add `ModelTier = 'frontier' | 'solid-coder' | 'quick-helper'`; extend `ModelOption` with optional `tier?: ModelTier` and `local?: boolean` (additive — no consumer breaks). In the runtime-connect schemas: installed-Ollama-model shape `{ id, sizeBytes, assessment: OllamaModelAssessment }` on the Ollama detection payload, and widen the pull request schema to any syntactically valid Ollama tag. Zod authoritative; TSDoc on exports. Acceptance: `pnpm --filter @dorkos/shared typecheck` + existing consumers compile; rebuild dist for dependents.

tasks.subject: [opencode-connect-overhaul] [P1] Credential-aware OpenCode readiness (root-cause fix)
tasks.description: Per spec §1: `checkOpenCodeDependencies`' auth check consults DorkOS-persisted provider state first — `config.runtimes.opencode.provider` set + credential requirement met (key providers: `config.providers[provider]` ref resolves via the credential-provider seam; ollama: provider set suffices) → satisfied with plain-language copy naming the source ('Connected via OpenRouter'). Fall back to today's `opencode auth list` probe. Dangling ref → missing with reconnect copy. Keep the check name matching `deriveRuntimeReadiness`'s `/auth|login/i` contract. Tests per spec §1 (all four states). This also un-blocks the client ready-flip/handoff chain — note it in the PR body.
tasks.activeForm: Fixing OpenCode readiness to read stored credentials

tasks.subject: [opencode-connect-overhaul] [P1] Model tiers module + tiered/sorted projectModelOptions
tasks.description: Per spec §2: new `services/runtimes/opencode/model-tiers.ts` — data-driven curated frontier pattern map, params-based solid-coder/quick-helper heuristic (parse `:7b`/`-14b` style), unknown → no tier (never guess). Pure `sortModelOptions`: frontier (curated order) → solid-coder → quick-helper → untiered alphabetical. Wire into `projectModelOptions` (models.ts): tag tiers, `local: true` for ollama-provider models, return sorted. claude-code/codex untouched. Unit tests for mapping table, heuristic boundaries, sort stability.
tasks.activeForm: Building model tiers and sorted projection

tasks.subject: [opencode-connect-overhaul] [P1] Ollama: installed models w/ verdicts, ~6-model catalog, pull-by-name
tasks.description: Per spec §3: (a) Ollama detection payload gains installed models from /api/tags with fit assessments (derive minMemoryBytes from tag size + existing 1.5× headroom); (b) expand OLLAMA_CODING_MODELS to ~6 honest coding picks with real Ollama tags/sizes (verify tags exist: qwen2.5-coder 7b/14b/32b, deepseek-r1 14b, + implementer-verified 1–2 more) each with `tier`; (c) POST pull accepts any valid tag (regex per spec), keeps SSE progress + loopback-only, non-curated pulls skip the pre-gate. Route/handler tests + ollama-catalog tests updated.
tasks.activeForm: Extending Ollama installed list, catalog, and pull

tasks.subject: [opencode-connect-overhaul] [P1] GPU probe: nvidia-smi VRAM detection on non-Apple-Silicon
tasks.description: Per spec §4: async hardware detection on non-unified platforms — `nvidia-smi --query-gpu=memory.total --format=csv,noheader,nounits` via execFile, ~1.5s timeout, largest GPU wins → `vramBytes`; any failure → today's RAM-only path with existing honest copy. No new npm deps. Callers move to async variant. Tests via injected snapshots (probe success, timeout, absent binary, darwin skip).

tasks.subject: [opencode-connect-overhaul] [P2] Power-source picker replaces the Local/Gateway/Direct tabs
tasks.description: Per spec §5 + 04-design-decisions: OpenCodeProviderPicker becomes a single-column card list (cloud recommended / local private-and-free / own key incl. OpenAI-compatible escape hatch) with in-dialog step navigation + back; final approved copy verbatim from spec; platform-adaptive 'this Mac'/'this computer'. Refactor existing path components into steps. RTL tests: card rendering, navigation, copy presence, FSD-clean imports.

tasks.subject: [opencode-connect-overhaul] [P2] Success moment + runtime handoff; delete the dead model dropdown end-to-end
tasks.description: Per spec §6: success panel with Done button on every connect path (replaces silent auto-close for this flow); keep and TEST the onRuntimeReady → onChangeRuntime → pendingRuntime → first-message `runtime:'opencode'` chain (live once PR1 ships). Delete Gateway ModelPicker, useOpenRouterModels, and — after confirming zero references — the server GET /api/runtimes/opencode/openrouter/models route + fetchOpenRouterModels + transport method. Verify sidecar picks up a first-ever credential (restart seam) per spec Risks; handle if not.
tasks.activeForm: Wiring success + handoff and removing dead code

tasks.subject: [opencode-connect-overhaul] [P2] Tiered, searchable model menu with local-privacy marks
tasks.description: Per spec §8: ModelConfigPopover renders search + tier groups (Frontier / Solid coders / Quick helpers / More models) when options carry tiers or exceed ~10; `local` models suffixed 'this Mac · private'; small untiered lists unchanged; keyboard + mobile sheet variants work. RTL tests for grouping, filtering, annotation, and the unchanged-small-list path.

tasks.subject: [opencode-connect-overhaul] [P2] Local panel scope B
tasks.description: Per spec §7 + local-models.html mockup: status line, Installed list (tier badge + verdict), curated shelf with one-click Get (streamed progress), pull-any-tag input, ollama.com/library link, LM Studio/OpenAI-compatible escape hatch row → Direct form; not-installed flow keeps guided install then lands here. RTL tests incl. pull-by-name submit and verdict rendering.
